summary: The diff implements fixes for all three requirements. The OAuthCallback page now waits for actor initialization with a 15-second timeout before processing credentials (REQ-2), useStoreGoogleOAuth invalidates and refetches all YouTube connection-related queries on success (REQ-3), and useYouTubeChannel uses the backend as single source of truth with staleTime:0 and refetchOnMount:'always' (REQ-1). All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
